description: You are an Investment Fund Manager (CFA, CAIA) launching 'Fund Alpha' at Constellation Capital Management. Create a portfolio in JStock named 'Fund Alpha' with a $500,000.00 deposit on January 2, 2024, using the comment 'Fund Alpha inception capital deployment'. Record equity purchases for January 2, 2024, with a $0.00 broker fee: 300 shares of SPY at $470.46 (comment: 'core beta allocation') and 200 shares of BRK.B at $363.21 (comment: 'value equity allocation'). Create a watchlist named 'Fund Alpha Watch' with the following alerts: SPY (Fall Below $445.00, Rise Above $510.00), QQQ (Fall Below $385.00, Rise Above $440.00), BRK.B (Fall Below $338.00, Rise Above $395.00), GLD (Fall Below $178.00, Rise Above $210.00), TLT (Fall Below $89.00, Rise Above $108.00), and VTI (Fall Below $225.00, Rise Above $260.00).
